targets.rawSql: SELECT time, SUM(current_value) as portfolio_value FROM portfolio_state WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
WITH dd AS (SELECT time::date as d, SUM(current_value) as v FROM portfolio_state WHERE status='active' GROUP BY d) SELECT d, (v / MAX(v) OVER () - 1) * 100 as drawdown FROM dd ORDER BY d
SELECT symbol, total_score, quality_score, value_score, technical_score, signal FROM score_snapshots WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY total_score DESC
SELECT COALESCE(sector, 'other') as sector, SUM(weight_pct) as total FROM portfolio_state WHERE status='active' GROUP BY sector
SELECT symbol, entry_price, current_price, shares, cost_basis, current_value, pnl_pct, weight_pct, sector FROM portfolio_state WHERE status='active' ORDER BY pnl_pct DESC

SELECT s.symbol, s.icb_name as sector, ROUND(s.market_cap/1e9, 0) as cap_tn, p.close as price, s.listed_date::text FROM vn30_symbols s LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT close FROM ohlc_prices WHERE symbol=s.symbol ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1) p ON true ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC
SELECT COALESCE(icb_name, 'Unknown') as sector, COUNT(*) as count FROM vn30_symbols WHERE status='active' GROUP BY icb_name ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT COALESCE(icb_name, 'Unknown') as sector, ROUND(SUM(market_cap)/1e12, 1) as cap_tn FROM vn30_symbols WHERE status='active' GROUP BY icb_name ORDER BY cap_tn DESC
SELECT task_name, symbol, status, started_at, completed_at, rows_inserted FROM ingestion_log WHERE started_at > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY started_at DESC
